overall.description: A cinematic third-person walkthrough of a gothic castle garden courtyard in a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring cobblestone paths, manicured hedges, a central tiered fountain, and students in house robes walking through the misty morning atmosphere with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved garden pathway with benches and distant castle views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved cobblestone path through the castle gardens, approaching the central fountain area

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a stone bench

entered.detail: wet cobblestone path curving through the garden with grass growing between stones
tall geometric hedge rows forming garden borders
large stone castle with pointed spires and gothic architecture
tall vertical banners on poles displaying house colors
misty mountains surrounding the castle valley
multi-level circular stone fountain visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty morning in a gothic castle garden, with the camera walking along a curved cobblestone path. Manicured hedges line the right side while a student sits on a stone bench to the left. In the distance, the castle towers rise above the mist with colorful house banners visible, and a tiered fountain marks the garden's center.

scene_state.functional_zone: central garden area approaching the fountain

events.description: two students in distinct house robes become visible standing and conversing near the hedges ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through the central garden area toward the fountain, passing students walking along the paths

notable_agents.action: two students in red and blue house robes standing and conversing near the hedge
student in red robes walking across the path from left to right

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the garden where the crowd density increases. Two students in colored house robes stand conversing near the hedges on the right, while others walk along the paths. The tiered fountain grows larger in the center of view, and the hedges now flank both sides of the pathway as the mountains fade from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hedge-lined approach to the central fountain and castle gate

events.description: camera passes between the two standing students and continues toward the fountain
approaching the central fountain with the castle gate archway now clearly visible beyond

agents.ego_description: walking between tall hedges toward the central fountain, passing students on the right side

notable_agents.action: student in yellow and black robes walking alongside the hedge

entered.detail: gothic arched stone entrance to the castle building beyond the fountain

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the conversing students and moves between tall manicured hedges toward the central tiered fountain. The castle gate archway becomes visible beyond the fountain, and the gothic architecture of the castle fills more of the background. A student in yellow robes walks along the right hedge as the pathway leads directly to the fountain basin.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty gothic garden that gradually narrows its focus from the wide castle grounds toward a central tiered fountain. It begins by gliding along a curved cobblestone path where a student rests on a stone bench and distant castle towers rise above the morning fog. As the camera moves deeper into the garden, the path becomes flanked by manicured hedges on both sides and the crowd of students in colorful house robes grows denser, causing the distant mountains to fade from view. The scene then shifts as the camera passes conversing students and pushes through the tall greenery, bringing the tiered fountain into sharp focus. Finally, the movement leads directly toward the fountain basin as the gothic architecture of a castle gate archway opens up to fill the background.
